chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Application No.1259 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on M.A. No.17160/2024 2. For hearing of main case ------------------------- 13.02.2026 Mr. Qamaruddin Nohri, D.P.G. -------------------------------- None present for the applicant. Same was the position on 17.12.2024 and 12.12.2025. Continuous absence of applicant as well as his counsel reflects that they have lost interest to pursue instant criminal miscellaneous application, which is accordingly dismissed on account of non-prosecution, along with pending application(s). J U D G E Gulsher/PS
